channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Allahabad High Court rules religious practice cannot override public land regulations in namaz plea
item.description: The Allahabad High Court has dismissed a petition filed by a man seeking permission to offer namaz on land in Sambhal district, Uttar Pradesh, which he claimed as private property. The petitioner argu...

item.title: Cameron Young Wins Cadillac Championship at Trump National Doral, Meets President Trump
item.description: Cameron Young has emerged as one of golf's hottest players in 2026, following an impressive streak of performances on the PGA Tour. After strong finishes at the Genesis Invitational and Bay Hill, Youn...

item.title: Jayson Tatum reflects on challenging season and off-season ahead
item.description: Jayson Tatum of the Boston Celtics has expressed that he has no regrets following an early exit from the NBA playoffs. After experiencing stiffness in his left knee before Game 7 against the Philadelp...

item.title: Australian Shares Likely to Dip Amid Record US Markets and NAB Earnings Report
item.description: Global markets showed mixed movements as Wall Street reached new highs, while the Australian sharemarket is expected to start the week lower. The S&P 500 rose 0.3 per cent, marking its fifth consecuti...

item.title: Italy’s top court upholds stricter citizenship-by-descent rules, affecting Australians
item.description: Italy’s Constitutional Court has upheld a controversial law that tightens eligibility for citizenship by descent, significantly impacting Australians with Italian heritage. The ruling confirms that on...

item.title: Toronto Raptors to play Game 7 without Brandon Ingram due to heel injury
item.description: The Toronto Raptors will be without star forward Brandon Ingram for Game 7 of their NBA Eastern Conference quarterfinal matchup against the Cleveland Cavaliers. Ingram, who has been dealing with infla...

item.title: Dickson Receives Obi and Kwankwaso into NDC, Praises Party Stability
item.description: On Sunday, former Bayelsa State Governor and Senator Seriake Dickson warmly received former governors Peter Obi of Anambra State and Musa Kwankwaso of Kano State into the Nigeria Democratic Congress (...

item.title: Sinner Dominates Zverev to Claim First Madrid Open and Fifth Straight Masters Title
item.description: World number one Jannik Sinner show serious class as he beat Alexander Zverev 6-1, 6-2 to win the Madrid Open for the first time. The Italian no just win the title, he also set new record by becoming ...

item.title: Introducing the Mother Wall Challenge in Imus, Cavite
item.description: The Mother Wall in Imus, Cavite has become a popular spot for fitness enthusiasts and adventurers alike. This wall, designed as a challenging climbing structure, has drawn attention from locals who ar...

item.title: Beagles rescued from Wisconsin breeding facility are rehomed across the US
item.description: The first group of beagles removed from Ridglan Farms, a dog breeding and research facility in Wisconsin, have begun settling into their new lives. The rescue was facilitated by Big Dog Ranch Rescue a...

item.title: 17-year-old arrested in connection with murder of 16-year-old girl in Limpopo
item.description: A 17-year-old boy has been arrested after the decapitated and naked body of a 16-year-old girl was discovered in a bush in Pharare village, Limpopo. According to Limpopo police spokesperson Col Malese...

item.title: Francis Uzoho Helps Omonia Win Cyprus League Title While Lukaku Considers Napoli Exit
item.description: Francis Uzoho, wey be Super Eagles second-choice goalkeeper, don lift Cyprus First Division trophy with Omonia Nicosia after dem beat Aris Limassol 3-0 on May 3. This win end Omonia’s five-year wait f...

item.title: Hundreds of South African civil servants remain on long-term suspension while drawing full salaries
item.description: In South Africa, a concerning number of civil servants are being suspended for extended periods while continuing to receive full pay. Currently, 674 provincial and national officials are on suspension...

item.title: Maple Leafs appoint Mats Sundin as senior adviser and John Chayka as general manager
item.description: In a surprising announcement, the Toronto Maple Leafs have hired former captain Mats Sundin as senior executive adviser of hockey operations and ex-Arizona Coyotes general manager John Chayka as the n...

item.title: Timber Structure Discovered Beneath Ancient Scottish Crannog
item.description: Archaeologists have uncovered a large timber platform beneath an artificial island in Loch Bhorgastail, on the Isle of Lewis, which predates Stonehenge. Initially thought to be primarily made of stone...

item.title: Dladla's hopes of securing permanent role after Durban City's historic cup win
item.description: Pitso Dladla, interim coach of Durban City, is hopeful that his side's historic Nedbank Cup victory against TS Galaxy will earn him a permanent coaching position. The team clinched their first-ever cu...

item.title: Poilievre urges Carney to outline Canada's negotiating position in U.S. trade talks
item.description: Conservative Leader Pierre Poilievre has called on former Bank of Canada Governor Mark Carney to clarify the specific leverage Canada holds in upcoming trade negotiations with the United States. This ...

item.title: Making the Most of Parent-Teacher Interviews: Practical Tips for Busy Parents
item.description: Parent-teacher interviews are usually brief, ranging from five to ten minutes per subject in high school and around 15 minutes in primary school. With such limited time, parents need to focus on what ...

item.title: Toronto Man, 67, Charged with Second-Degree Murder Following Fatal Daylight Shooting
item.description: Toronto police have arrested a 67-year-old man and charged him with second-degree murder following a fatal shooting in the city's north end. The victim, identified as 47-year-old Daniel Stopnicki, was...

item.title: Arteta Hails Arsenal’s Resilience After 3-0 Win Over Fulham
item.description: Arsenal kept their Premier League title hopes alive with a dominant 3-0 win over Fulham, says manager Mikel Arteta. The Gunners showcased their attacking prowess in a brilliant first-half performance,...
